name: clawd-companion
description: Clawd Companion - Real-time Claude Code desktop companion showing tool calls and session status
author: Doulor

scripts.dev:electron: tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && concurrently -k "npm run dev" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && tsc -p tsconfig.json && vite build && npm run build:forwarder
scripts.build:forwarder: tsc -p apps/hook-forwarder-core/tsconfig.json && tsc -p apps/hook-forwarder/tsconfig.json && tsc -p apps/hook-forwarder-codex/tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/hook-forwarder-core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/hook-forwarder/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/hook-forwarder-codex/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: vitest run --root apps/hook-forwarder && vitest run --root apps/desktop
